unity_only_compliance.creation_method: Unity batchmode editor script built the meshes, materials, lighting, cameras, RenderTextures, PNG output, and contact sheet inside Unity.
verification: Render log includes UNITY_WEAPON_ASSEMBLY_LOOKDEV_RENDERED with all nine PNG paths.
PNG dimensions were verified after render.
No Blender, Python, PIL, external DCC, or external image-generation tool was used.
No main gameplay scenes/scripts/shared status docs or main manifest were edited.
